steps.title: Use the participle modifier
steps.content: The phrase after the blank modifies a theoretical relationship between tax rates and revenue. The past participle sketched can do that directly, and the adverb famously can modify it without adding a helping verb.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary verbs
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B add helping verbs that make the modifier a separate finite clause. Choice C uses plural were, which does not agree with the singular relationship being described. The answer is D.
